MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

84 
EHR_PYMT_ADJSTMT_AMT 
LABEL: 
Electronic Health Record (EHR) Payment Adjustment Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount field (rounded to whole dollars) that represents the Electronic Health Record (EHR) 
Payment reduction for eligible hospitals that are not meaningful EHR users. 
SHORT NAME: EHR_PYMT_ADJSTMT_AMT 
LONG NAME: EHR_PYMT_ADJSTMT_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
—
